'''Sothek''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Yinchorri/Legends|Yinchorri]] who served as a member of the [[Council of Elders (Yinchorri)|Council of Elders]] during the waning years of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. In [[33 BBY/Legends|33 BBY]], he and his fellow Councilors were persuaded by [[Vilmarh Grahrk]] to [[Raid on the Golden Nyss Shipyards|raid]] the [[Golden Nyss Shipyards]].
